name: Winter Fairytale: Jigsaw Puzzles
description: “Winter Fairytale: Jigsaw Puzzles” is a cozy winter jigsaw game with magical illustrations: snowy forests, Santa-like characters, fairy-tale heroes, animals, and festive scenes. Pick a picture, choose the number of pieces, then drag and place the pieces until the image is complete. Win puzzles to earn stars and unlock new artworks — harder puzzles give bigger rewards. Relaxing music, a clean UI, and confetti after completion make it perfect for a calm break.
instructions: Mouse Touch drag and drop puzzle pieces into place Click a picture to select an image Choose the number of pieces before starting Sound button mdash toggle music on off Exit X button mdash return to selection screen Fullscreen button mdash
